input.style: width:100%; height:45px; padding:0 15px; font-size:15px; border:2px solid #333; border-radius:12px; background:#0a0a1a; color:#fff; outline:none; transition:border-color 0.3s; box-sizing:border-box;
width:100%; height:50px; padding:0 18px; font-size:16px; border:2px solid #333; border-radius:12px; background:#0a0a1a; color:#fff; outline:none; transition:border-color 0.3s; box-sizing:border-box;

button.style: width:100%; height:100%; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; color:#fff; background:linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); border:none; border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; transition:transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;

label.style: display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; cursor:pointer; font-family:-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size:14px; color:#aaa;

svg.text: 1. Enter your proxy backend URL (or use the default)
2. Type the website URL you want to browse anonymously
3. Click "Browse" to load the site through the proxy
Note: This proxy uses Scramjet to bypass internet censorship.
Works best with HTTP backends on HTTP pages, HTTPS on HTTPS pages.

iframe.style: width:100%; height:100%; border:none; border-radius:15px; background:#fff; box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
iframe.sandbox: allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-forms allow-popups allow-top-navigation allow-downloads
